displayTitle: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #02: The Rebel Opposition
synopsis: When Rogue Squadron leader Wedge Antilles is downed in a bloody battle against Imperial All Terrain Scout Transports, he is forced to form an uneasy alliance with the Cilpari natives, whose dislike for the Rebels is only dwarfed by their hatred for the Empire. Wedge must regroup Rogue Squadron before the Cilpari alliance is shattered, and rejoin the battle to save the galaxy!
title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #02: The Rebel Opposition
